# unilyze-setup

> Set up unilyze for a Unity or .NET project — installation, first snapshot, CI integration with SARIF, badge generation, and baseline creation for zero-new-violations enforcement. Use when onboarding unilyze or configuring quality gates.

## Install

### APM (recommended)

```bash
apm install bigdra50/skills/tooling/unilyze-setup
```

Or declare it in `apm.yml` for a reproducible setup:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - bigdra50/skills/tooling/unilyze-setup
```

then run `apm install`.

### Any agentskills.io-compatible agent

This is an [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) skill — a portable
`SKILL.md` folder that works with Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Gemini CLI,
Cursor, and other [compatible agents](https://agentskills.io/clients).

With the [`skills`](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) CLI (installs into
every detected agent's skills directory):

```bash
npx skills add bigdra50/skills --skill unilyze-setup
```

Or copy the folder in directly:

```bash
npx degit bigdra50/skills/tooling/unilyze-setup ~/.claude/skills/unilyze-setup
```

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
